productDisplayName: C Vox Men Delirious Disclosure Navy Blue Jacket
description: CompositionNavy blue jacket with the shell and lining made of 100% polyester, has full sleeves with a ribbed cuffs, ribbed collar, two zippered pockets on the sides, one zippered pocket on the right chest, rubber printed branding on left chest, zippered front placket and stripes on the ribbed hem and cuffsTech Features:Built-in washable stereo speakers in collarBuilt-in washable earphone in collarBuilt-in headphone jack in inside breast pocketSwap Button to swap between speakers/earphoneMulti-purpose button to for Play/Stop(manage music) & Answer/End call (manage phone calls)Built-in microphone to speak into while on a phone callFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold at 30 degreesDo not use softeners, iron, or bleachC.Vox, the pioneer in high-tech sportswear with incorporated consumer electronics. The label fashioned this piece for the person braving the elements. Its polyester outer protects you from cold and sleet while its built-in earphones, washable microphones, audio jack and mike offers the wearer the convenience of enjoying music or taking a call in any weather, much required for today's fast-paced lifestyle.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18& rdquo
